title: Mouse-wheel weapon cycling collapses N notches to 1 (M2.2)

history.note: Landed 5d90a94 (fix(input): M2.2 mouse-wheel weapon cycling steps once per notch via pcQueueWeaponCycleSteps). NOT verified: headless cannot inject SDL wheel events (commit validated the wheel=+3 path by hand), sim_state_hash does not exercise it. Needs a wheel-notch cycling lane.

Regression lane tests/test_weapon_cycle_queue.c (ctest weapon_cycle_queue) drives the pure weapon_cycle_queue.c TU: queue clamps at 5, non-positive delta no-op, 3 queued notches -> 3 cycle steps over 3 ticks (not 1), single notch -> exactly one. Fail-on-revert proven: making the drain zero the counter (pre-fix boolean collapse) drops 3-over-3 to 1, lane red; restored->green. ge007 builds clean; sim_state_hash unchanged. Committed 39aae93.
